prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年上海综合类最低录取位次分别为约22656名、19960名、23963名，近三年波动较大，2024年位次明显前移后2025年又大幅后移，2025年基准位次约239 63名；该校在上海综合类招生计划2023–2025年均为2人，2026年扩至4人，扩招幅度达100%，大幅增加 招生名额将显著降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年主榜约第62名，校本部石油与天然气工程为A+学 科，克拉玛依校区共享校本部211/双一流身份，对考生有一定吸引力；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度、投档异常等文件中均无显著记录，舆情平稳，未见明显正面 或负面信号影响报考心理；学科评估数据中未单独收录克拉玛依校区信息，校本部石油与天然气工程为A+学科，但上海招生专业为统计学和大数据管理与应用， 与石油主干学科关联较弱。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 统计学属数学/统计大类，2024年专业热度评估为"推荐"；大数据管理与应用属计算机/管理交叉方向， 相关领域热度较高。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，考生规模大幅扩大将加剧整体竞争；该校克拉玛依校区位于新疆维吾尔自治区，与上海距离较远，上海考生跨省就读意愿相对偏低，但211身份仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23963名 、2026年招生计划翻倍至4人（大幅扩招使录取门槛显著降低）、上海市考生总数增加约35%（竞争加剧部分抵消扩招效应）以及专业热度偏正面等因素，预测2026年最低录取位次 约38141名，区间37641–38641名。扩招是位次后移的最主要驱动因素，考生总数增加则对位次有一定上移压力。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 大数据管理与应用。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无（该校在上海仅招2个专业，计划各2人，两专业位次差距不大）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校2026年在上海综合类仅招大数据管理与应用（物理必选）和统计学（物理、化学必选）两个专业，各招2人。预测位次在38141名左右，区间37641–38641名。位次在此区间内 的考生可将该校作为保底或稳妥选择；位次明显优于区间下限（如35000名以内）可大胆报考；位次在区间上限附近（约38600名以后）则存在一定风险，建议结合其他院校志愿合 理搭配。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were approximately 22656, 19960, and 23963 respectively, with significant fluctuations in recent three years. The ranking notably moved forward in 2024 but then moved backward substantially in 2025, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 23963. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai Comprehensive category was 2 students each year from 2023 to 2025, and it will expand to 4 students in 2026, an increase of 100%. This substantial increase in enrollment slots will significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings main list. Its main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is an A+ discipline. The Karamay Campus shares the 211/Double First-Class status with the main campus, which has a certain appeal to candidates. The university has no significant records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or admission anomalies files, with stable public opinion and no obvious positive or negative signals affecting application psychology. The discipline evaluation data does not separately include information for the Karamay Campus. The main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is an A+ discipline, but the majors enrolled in Shanghai are Statistics and Big Data Management and Application, which have weak correlation with the main petroleum disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Statistics belongs to the Mathematics/Statistics category, with a 2024 major popularity evaluation of 'Recommended'. Big Data Management and Application is a cross-disciplinary field of Computer/Management, with relatively high popularity in related fields. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66700, an increase of about 35% compared to 49276 in 2025. The significant expansion of the candidate pool will intensify overall competition. The Karamay Campus is located in the Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region, far from Shanghai. Shanghai candidates have relatively low willingness to study across provinces, but the 211 status still has a certain appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 23963, the doubling of the 2026 enrollment plan to 4 students (substantial expansion significantly lowers the admission threshold), the increase in Shanghai candidates by about 35% (intensified competition partially offsets the expansion effect), and the relatively positive major popularity, the predicted 2026 minimum admission ranking is approximately 38141, with a range of 37641 to 38641. Expansion is the main driving factor for the ranking moving backward, while the increase in total candidates exerts some upward pressure on the ranking.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Big Data Management and Application.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
None (the university only enrolls 2 majors in Shanghai, each with 2 slots, and the ranking gap between the two majors is small).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, this university only enrolls two majors in Shanghai Comprehensive category: Big Data Management and Application (Physics required) and Statistics (Physics and Chemistry required), each with 2 slots. The predicted ranking is around 38141, with a range of 37641 to 38641. Candidates with rankings within this range can consider this university as a safe or stable choice; those with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 35000) can apply confidently; candidates with rankings near the upper bound (around 38600 or later) face some risk and are advised to combine with other university choices appropriately.
